summary: Plan-mode classification only. #22770 is the open representative but is explicitly security-sensitive in the preflight artifact, so it should be routed to central OpenClaw security handling. #55836 is related TUI editor ergonomics work, but it is a distinct vi/vim in-place input-mode feature and should remain open separately.

actions.reason: External-editor handoff involves process launch and temporary prompt-file lifecycle concerns flagged by the hydrated artifact; route only this item to central security handling and do not mutate it through Clownfish.
Same TUI composer/editor family, but different user-facing feature and implementation scope; it is not a duplicate of the external-editor compose-mode request.
